name: Cloud Herb Tender Xue
personality: dreamy, nurturing, treats herbs like children
speech: soft, meandering, loses track of conversations
initiation_lines: The cloud herbs here only grow because the wind carries seeds from places no map records. I have identified forty-seven species. Three are unnamed.
The Alchemist Su says my herbs lack altitude-potency. I say her pills lack patience. The herbs agree with me.
Once a year, a red feather falls into the garden. I do not know from what creature. I keep every one. I have sixty-three.
Bring me bone meal and quartz. The cloud herbs need minerals from the sky to maintain their spiritual resonance.

sect_tasks.name: Cloud Herb Sky Minerals
sect_tasks.description: Cloud herbs need quartz and bone meal for sky-mineral fertilization to maintain spiritual potency.

sect_tasks.name: Herb Delivery to Alchemist
sect_tasks.description: Deliver harvested cloud herbs to the alchemy courtyard. Bring glass bottles and coal for the exchange.
